MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MICHAEL FREUND, ESQ., LAW OFFICE OF MICHAEL FREUND, 510.540.1992, FOR PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER; No other appearances.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER'S Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Judgment UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

***AFTER HEARING, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER'S Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Judgment. STATUTORY FINDINGS AND ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT SIGNED. AMENDED STIPULATED CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED. ***
